trans-unit.source: Time of mail creation
trans-unit.target: ເວລາທີ່ສ້າງອີເມລ

trans-unit.source: This is the email of the sender
trans-unit.target: ນີ້ແມ່ນອີເມລຂອງຜູ້ສົ່ງ

trans-unit.source: This is the name of the sender
trans-unit.target: ນີ້ແມ່ນຊື່ຂອງຜູ້ສົ່ງ

trans-unit.source: E-Mail Subject
trans-unit.target: ຫົວຂໍ້ອີເມລ

trans-unit.source: All input values at a glance
trans-unit.target: ພາບລວມຂອງຄ່າທີ່ປ້ອນເຂົ້າທັງໝົດ

trans-unit.source: E-Mail Receiver
trans-unit.target: ຜູ້ຮັບອີເມລ

trans-unit.source: Related Form
trans-unit.target: ແບບຟອມທີ່ກ່ຽວຂ້ອງ

trans-unit.source: All transferred Answers
trans-unit.target: ຄຳຕອບທັງໝົດທີ່ຖືກສົ່ງມາ

trans-unit.source: This FE User send the mail (if empty, no logged in User sends the mail)
trans-unit.target: ຜູ້ໃຊ້ FE ນີ້ເປັນຜູ້ສົ່ງອີເມລ (ຖ້າວ່າງເປົ່າ, ສະແດງວ່າບໍ່ມີຜູ້ໃຊ້ທີ່ເຂົ້າສູ່ລະບົບເປັນຜູ້ສົ່ງ)

trans-unit.source: Powermail identifies this mail as spam with this factor (if factor is too high, mail sending will be refused)
trans-unit.target: Powermail ລະບຸວ່າອີເມລນີ້ເປັນສະແປມດ້ວຍຄ່ານີ້ (ຖ້າຄ່າສູງເກີນໄປ, ການສົ່ງອີເມລຈະຖືກປະຕິເສດ)

trans-unit.source: User needs this time to fill out the form
trans-unit.target: ເວລາທີ່ຜູ້ໃຊ້ໃຊ້ໃນການຕື່ມແບບຟອມ

trans-unit.source: IP-Address of the sender
trans-unit.target: ທີ່ຢູ່ IP ຂອງຜູ້ສົ່ງ

trans-unit.source: Browser characteristic of the sender
trans-unit.target: ຂໍ້ມູນສະເພາະບຣາວເຊີຂອງຜູ້ສົ່ງ

trans-unit.source: Last Domain of the user before he surfed to this URL
trans-unit.target: ໂດເມນຫຼ້າສຸດຂອງຜູ້ໃຊ້ກ່ອນທີ່ຈະເຂົ້າມາຫາ URL ນີ້

trans-unit.source: Last URL of the user before he surfed to this URL
trans-unit.target: URL ຫຼ້າສຸດຂອງຜູ້ໃຊ້ກ່ອນທີ່ຈະເຂົ້າມາຫາ URL ນີ້

trans-unit.source: User is located in this country
trans-unit.target: ຜູ້ໃຊ້ອາໄສຢູ່ໃນປະເທດນີ້

trans-unit.source: User uses a mobile device
trans-unit.target: ຜູ້ໃຊ້ເຂົ້າເຖິງດ້ວຍອຸປະກອນມືຖື

trans-unit.source: User surfed in this TYPO3-Frontend-Language
trans-unit.target: ຜູ້ໃຊ້ທ່ອງເວັບດ້ວຍພາສາ Frontend ຂອງ TYPO3 ນີ້

trans-unit.source: Users Browser Language
trans-unit.target: ພາສາບຣາວເຊີຂອງຜູ້ໃຊ້

trans-unit.source: Internal Page funnel up to the form submit
trans-unit.target: ລຳດັບການເຂົ້າຊົມໜ້າເວັບພາຍໃນກ່ອນຈະສົ່ງແບບຟອມ
